series_metadata.series_title: UNDERGROUND STORAGE TANKS FEDERAL REGISTRATION FORMS
series_metadata.series_description: File contains the name and address of underground tank owners plus tank information such as age, capacity, material, construction protection, substance type and usage.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Microfilm hard copy records. microfilm has been checked quality and completeness ; Microform: permanent on microfilm. master in off-site storage permanently. diazo in operating area at all times
